title: Task outcome: Implement first progress toward goal: P0-02 status freshness plus P0-01 full-memory audit for Di
summary: Implemented and pushed the first P0 progress for DinoBrain OS readiness: reproducible full-memory audit and status freshness gates. Added full-memory manifest/status generation, current-vault freshness monitoring, regression verifiers, package scripts, verification docs, and wired the new gates into verify:goal so P0-01/P0-02 cannot be bypassed in final readiness.
claim: Task outcome for DinoBrain: Implemented and pushed the first P0 progress for DinoBrain OS readiness: reproducible full-memory audit and status freshness gates. Added full-memory manifest/status generation, current-vault freshness monitoring, regression verifiers, package scripts, verification docs, and wired the new gates into verify:goal so P0-01/P0-02 cannot be bypassed in final readiness.
request: Implement first progress toward goal: P0-02 status freshness plus P0-01 full-memory audit for DinoBrain, then prepare path toward review queue/semantic job settlement, finish-gate integrity, and real RAG eval. Start with current repo inspection and code changes aligned with existing verifier patterns.
decisions: Full-memory audit scans all non-Git data-vault files by path, byte size, SHA-256, mtime, and parse status without storing raw file contents.
Baseline creation no longer treats the whole vault as drift; drift comparison begins only when a previous manifest exists.
Drift is classified as live OS write, review queue write, audit artifact, or content drift; unclassified content drift and parse errors cause the full-memory CLI to fail.
Status freshness now checks required proof artifacts against source roots and excludes the artifact itself from its own source scan to prevent false-green freshness.
verify:goal now runs both regression verifiers and current-vault audit/freshness commands, making P0-01/P0-02 part of the completion gate.
next_steps: Implement review queue burn-down and semantic job settlement so 483 pending candidate/review records stop accumulating as unclassified backlog.

Add task session lifecycle and finish-gate integrity fields such as prompt_hash, source_event_id, required-read satisfaction, grounding classification, stale active task handling, and wrong-task finish rejection.
Move real RAG eval beyond term/path recall toward generated answer correctness, faithfulness, provenance, latency, and memory-on/off behavior comparison.
Expose full-memory audit and status freshness in Observatory Korean UI with DOM/screenshot proof.

evidence.snippet: Implemented and pushed the first P0 progress for DinoBrain OS readiness: reproducible full-memory audit and status freshness gates. Added full-memory manifest/status generation, current-vault freshness monitoring, regression verifiers, package scripts, verification docs, and wired the new gates into verify:goal so P0-01/P0-02 cannot be bypassed in final readiness.
